<rdf:RDF 
    xmlns:rdf="http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#" 
    xmlns:owl="http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#" 
    xmlns:rdfs="http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#" 
    xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#" 
    xmlns:onto="http://iiitb.ac.in/ontology/autonomous#">

  <!-- Classes -->
  <owl:Class rdf:ID="AcademicProgram">
    <rdfs:comment>Represents an academic program</rdfs:comment>
  </owl:Class>

  <owl:Class rdf:ID="Degree">
    <rdfs:comment>Represents a degree</rdfs:comment>
    <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource="#AcademicProgram"/>
  </owl:Class>

  <owl:Class rdf:ID="FieldOfStudy">
    <rdfs:comment>Represents a field of study</rdfs:comment>
  </owl:Class>

  <!-- Individuals -->
  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="B_Tech_AIDS">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#Degree"/>
    <onto:hasName rdf:datatype="xsd:string">B.Tech. (Artificial Intelligence & Data Science)</onto:hasName>
    <onto:hasFieldOfStudy rdf:resource="#ArtificialIntelligenceAndDataScience"/>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>

  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="ArtificialIntelligenceAndDataScience">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#FieldOfStudy"/>
    <rdfs:comment>Represents the field of Artificial Intelligence and Data Science</rdfs:comment>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>

  <!-- Object Properties -->
  <owl:ObjectProperty rdf:ID="hasName">
    <rdfs:comment>Relates a degree to its name</rdfs:comment>
    <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="#Degree"/>
    <rdfs:range rdf:resource="xsd:string"/>
  </owl:ObjectProperty>

  <owl:ObjectProperty rdf:ID="hasFieldOfStudy">
    <rdfs:comment>Relates a degree to its field of study</rdfs:comment>
    <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="#Degree"/>
    <rdfs:range rdf:resource="#FieldOfStudy"/>
  </owl:ObjectProperty>

</rdf:RDF>
